title.en: Rice back in England training but James misses out again
title.zh-CN: 莱斯回到英格兰训练，但詹姆斯再次错过

summary.en: Declan Rice returns to England training on Friday, but Reece James again misses out and remains a doubt to face Panama.
summary.zh-CN: 德克兰·赖斯（ Declan Rice ）周五返回英格兰训练，但里斯·詹姆斯（ Reece James ）再次错过，面对巴拿马仍然是一个疑

title.en: Is a former England striker right about reasons for Scottish football's ills?
title.zh-CN: 关于苏格兰足球弊病的原因，前英格兰前锋是否正确？

summary.en: From undervalued broadcasting deals to unfulfilled potential, Ian Wright says he feels sorry for Scottish football fans - but is the former England striker right?
summary.zh-CN: 从被低估的转播交易到未实现的潜力，伊恩·赖特（ Ian Wright ）表示他对苏格兰足球迷感到遗憾-但这位前英格兰前锋是对的吗？

title.en: Rainbow flags await Egypt and Iran at awkward Pride Match
title.zh-CN: 彩虹旗在尴尬的骄傲比赛中等待埃及和伊朗

summary.en: Iran's coach refuses to discuss pride celebrations in Seattle, where his country face Egypt in a crucial Group G match.
summary.zh-CN: 伊朗教练拒绝讨论在西雅图举行的骄傲庆祝活动，他的国家在关键的G组比赛中面对埃及。

title.en: Has VAR become a lottery at the World Cup?
title.zh-CN: VAR是否在世界杯上成为彩票？

summary.en: After a week of strange decisions many supporters have been left scratching their heads with VAR.
summary.zh-CN: 经过一周的奇怪决定，许多支持者被VAR挠头。

title.en: Start Rashford? Bring O'Reilly back? Pick your England XI to face Panama
title.zh-CN: 启动拉什福德？让奥莱利回来？选择您的英格兰XI面对巴拿马

summary.en: Who should start for England against Panama in their final World Cup group game? It's time to put yourself in Thomas Tuchel's shoes.
summary.zh-CN: 谁应该在英格兰队对阵巴拿马队的最后一场世界杯小组赛中首发？是时候站在Thomas Tuchel的立场了。

title.en: From 42% to 5.26% - how Scotland's World Cup hopes are fading
title.zh-CN: 从42%降至5.26% --苏格兰世界杯的希望正在消退

summary.en: Defeat against Brazil left Scotland in a precarious position, but little has gone their way since either.
summary.zh-CN: 对巴西的失利使苏格兰处于不稳定的境地，但从那时起，苏格兰也没有什么进展。

title.en: Hart explains how goalkeepers are struggling with World Cup ball
title.zh-CN: 哈特解释了守门员如何为世界杯球而苦苦挣扎

summary.en: Former England goalkeeper Joe Hart answers your questions about the Trionda World Cup ball and how it might be affecting goalkeepers at the tournament.
summary.zh-CN: 前英格兰守门员乔·哈特（ Joe Hart ）回答了您关于特里奥达世界杯球的问题，以及它可能对比赛守门员产生的影响。

title.en: Turkey end World Cup on high with last-gasp win over USA
title.zh-CN: 土耳其以最后一场战胜美国的比赛结束世界杯

summary.en: Turkey come out on top in the last minute of an end-to-end 3-2 win over a second string USA side, in their final Group D match at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles.
summary.zh-CN: 土耳其队在洛杉矶SoFi体育场举行的最后一场D组比赛中，以3-2战胜了第二弦美国队的最后一分钟名列前茅。

title.en: Brobbey on target again as Netherlands beat Tunisia to win group
title.zh-CN: 布罗比再次命中目标，荷兰击败突尼斯赢得小组赛

summary.en: Brian Brobbey scores for the second game in a row as Netherlands defeat Tunisia 3-1 to top Group F, setting up a match against Morocco in the last 32 at the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 布莱恩·布罗比（ Brian Brobbey ）连续第二场比赛得分，荷兰以3比1击败突尼斯队，以F组领先，在世界杯的最后32场比赛中与摩洛哥队进行了一场比赛。

title.en: What do numbers tell us about Scotland's World Cup attacking intent?
title.zh-CN: 关于苏格兰世界杯的攻击意图，数字告诉我们什么？

summary.en: BBC Scotland crunches the numbers behind Steve Clarke's blunt attack and looks at the potential deeper issues.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司苏格兰频道（ BBC Scotland ）对史蒂夫·克拉克（ Steve Clarke ）的直言不讳的攻击背后的数字进行了

title.en: How are the TV picks decided for the World Cup's round of 32?
title.zh-CN: 世界杯32强的电视选秀权是如何决定的？

summary.en: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team explains the complexities behind television selections for the 2026 World Cup's round of 32 fixtures
summary.zh-CN: BBC Sport的Ask Me Anything团队解释了2026年世界杯32场比赛电视选择背后的复杂性

title.en: Australia through and Paraguay close following draw between sides
title.zh-CN: 澳大利亚通过和巴拉圭在双方平局后关闭

summary.en: Australia sealed their passage to the last 32 and Paraguay are almost certain to join them after they shared a drab draw in San Francisco which suited both sides.
summary.zh-CN: 澳大利亚封锁了他们通往最后32名球员的通道，巴拉圭几乎肯定会在他们在旧金山进行了一场适合双方的单调抽签后加入他们的行列。

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 19
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星19号

summary.en: Will you get today's World Cup player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的世界杯球员吗？

title.en: What is SkyJo? The card game being played in the England camp
title.zh-CN: SkyJo是什么？在英格兰营地玩的纸牌游戏

summary.en: As England try to get their game right on the pitch, the games they play off the field are performing a key role in team bonding - as Morgan Rogers reveals to BBC Sport.
summary.zh-CN: 当英格兰队试图在球场上取得好成绩时，他们在球场外进行的比赛在团队凝聚力方面发挥着关键作用-正如摩根·罗杰斯向BBC Sport透露的那样。
